sections.heading: 1. Acceptance & eligibility
sections.body: By creating an account or using {{tradeName}} you agree to these Terms. You must be at least 18 years old, and if you accept on behalf of an organization you confirm you are authorized to bind it.

sections.heading: 2. Definitions
sections.body: "Service" means the {{tradeName}} platform; "Organization" the workspace you belong to; "Content" the data you submit, including meeting audio and transcripts; "Meeting Data" any recording or transcription processed by the Service.

sections.heading: 3. The service & licence
sections.body: {{tradeName}} grants you a limited, revocable, non-exclusive licence to use the Service to capture meetings and generate requirement artifacts. You may not reverse engineer, resell, abuse, or use it for unlawful purposes.

sections.heading: 4. Accounts & organizations
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information, for safeguarding your credentials, and for the actions of the members you invite to your Organization.

sections.heading: 5. Meeting recording & consent
sections.body: You represent and warrant that, before recording or transcribing any meeting, you have obtained every consent required by law from all participants — some jurisdictions require the consent of all parties. {{tradeName}} provides a recording indicator, but your Organization is solely responsible for lawful capture and will indemnify {{name}} against claims arising from a breach of this section.

sections.heading: 6. AI-generated output
sections.body: User stories, suggestions and other AI output are generated automatically, may be inaccurate or incomplete, and are provided for your review. They are not professional, legal or business advice; review them before relying on them.

sections.heading: 7. Your content & intellectual property
sections.body: You retain ownership of your Content and grant {{tradeName}} a limited licence to process it solely to provide the Service. {{name}} retains all rights in the platform, software and trademarks.

sections.heading: 8. Third-party AI sub-processors
sections.body: To deliver the Service we rely on third-party AI providers — Deepgram (speech-to-text), Google Gemini (generation) and OpenAI (embeddings). Details are in our Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 9. Model training
sections.body: We do not use your Content, or data derived from it, to train {{tradeName}}'s or our sub-processors' machine-learning models.

sections.heading: 10. Fees & subscription
sections.body: Paid plans, where offered, are billed on a recurring basis and renew until cancelled. We may change pricing with prior notice; the Service may be offered free of charge in whole or in part.

sections.heading: 11. Termination & data export
sections.body: You may stop using the Service at any time. On termination you will have a reasonable window to export your data before it is deleted, subject to the retention rules in the Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 12. Warranties & limitation of liability
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, {{name}} is not liable for indirect or consequential damages, and its total liability is limited to the amounts you paid in the previous twelve months.

sections.heading: 13. Changes to these Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms; when the substance changes we will ask you to accept the new version. Continued use after an update constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 14. Governing law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of {{jurisdiction}}, and any dispute is subject to the competent courts of {{jurisdiction}}.

sections.heading: 15. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these Terms can be sent to {{email}}.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
sections.body: {{name}} ({{address}}) is the controller of the personal data processed through {{tradeName}}. You can reach us about privacy at {{email}}.

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
sections.body: Account data (name, email), the meeting audio and transcripts you submit, the requirement artifacts and embeddings generated from them, and technical data such as IP address, device and usage logs.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes & lawful bases
sections.body: We process data to provide the Service (performance of a contract), to keep it secure (legitimate interest), to comply with the law, and — where third parties are recorded — on the basis of the consent you are responsible for obtaining.

sections.heading: 4. AI processing & sub-processors
sections.body: Audio and text are processed by Deepgram (speech-to-text), Google Gemini (generation) and OpenAI (embeddings) strictly to provide the Service. Neither they nor {{tradeName}} use your data to train models.

sections.heading: 5. International transfers
sections.body: Some sub-processors operate outside your country, so your data may be processed abroad under appropriate safeguards.

sections.heading: 6. Retention
sections.body: Audio and transcript retention is configurable per Organization (audio-retention days; -1 keeps them until you delete them). Other data is kept while your account is active and as required by law.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body: Subject to applicable law you may access, rectify, erase, port, or object to the processing of your data, and withdraw consent. Write to {{email}} to exercise these rights; you may also complain to your data-protection authority.

sections.heading: 8. Security
sections.body: We protect data with encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, and strict per-Organization isolation (a separate database schema per tenant). We will notify you of a breach as required by law.

sections.heading: 9. Cookies & local storage
sections.body: We store only what the app needs to work — session handling and your theme and language preferences. We do not use advertising cookies.

sections.heading: 10. Children
sections.body: The Service is not directed to children and is intended for users aged 18 or older.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to this Policy
sections.body: We may update this Policy; we will post the new effective date and, where the change is material, notify you.

sections.heading: 12. Data Processing Agreement
sections.body: Organizations acting as data controllers can request a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) by contacting {{email}}.
